predictions.source_quote: We now expect DM GDP growth to decelerate from a 5.0% annual average pace in 2021 to 4.0% in 2022
core CPI (Consumer Price Index) inflation is likely to peak around 6.0% year-over-year in 1Q 2022
before moderating back to 2.5-3.0% by year-end

predictions.variable: Fed asset purchase tapering end date
predictions.source_quote: The Federal Reserve is now likely to wind down its asset purchases by March
predictions.reason: Qualitative timing prediction - tapering actually ended March 2022, so this was correct
Qualitative timing prediction - first hike was March 16 2022, so this was correct

predictions.source_quote: We forecast GDP-weighted growth across four of the major EM countries – Brazil, Russia, India, and Mexico (BRIM) – to slow to 4.1% year-over-year
we forecast 2022 BRIM headline inflation at 6.2% y/y
